title: OPEN ADOPTION & FAMILY SERVICES - 211info
text: OPEN ADOPTION & FAMILY SERVICES PORTLAND OPEN ADOPTION & FAMILY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Supports pregnant women and couples in making informed decisions about pregnancy options, including parenting, abortion, and adoption. Open adoptions offer ongoing visits and lifelong services. 9320 SW Barbur Boulevard Suite 200 Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Expectant parents Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm. On-call counselor available evenings and weekends for time-sensitive pregnancy options counseling and client work. Email (503) 226-4870 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Portland Area (503) 226-4870 Toll-free (800) 772-1115 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or visit website to complete an online contact form. In-person and virtual appointments are available. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Abortion Referrals Adoption Services Crisis Pregnancy Hotlines Pro-Choice Pregnancy Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OPEN ADOPTION & FAMILY SERVICES PORTLAND
